title: audibertiella clevelandii
intro: Audibertiella clevelandii is a plant species native to Hawaii, belonging to the family Gentianaceae. It is also known as the Hawaiian gentian, which is a type of flowering plant. The medicinal properties of Audibertiella clevelandii include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in traditional medicine. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. The herbal preparations of Audibertiella clevelandii often involve drying the leaves and roots to create teas, infusions, or poultices for topical application.
